privileged_info_summary: All claimed metadata paths are correct. Running the SUMO simulation on the provided Bologna Pasubio data yields the following true average trip durations: 0% penetration = 329.19, 25% penetration = 304.05, and 75% penetration = 297.93. The verifier uses a 0.05 absolute tolerance when comparing the agent's reported CSV averages to the averages calculated directly from the agent's own generated XML files.
